user.title: Amazing Irrigation
user.description: Set up Amazing Irrigation. After installation you can add Irrigation Zones from the integration's configuration.

init.title: Irrigation Zones
init.description: Add, edit or remove Irrigation Zones.

add_zone.title: Add an Irrigation Zone
add_zone.description: An Irrigation Zone observes soil moisture and typed inputs, and optionally waters through a generic Watering Actuator. Pick the actuator type here; its specific fields appear on the next step.

data.name: Zone name
data.safety_blockers: Safety Blockers (block watering when on or unavailable)
data.field_capacity: Field Capacity anchor (%, optional — blank = auto)
data.wilting_point: Wilting Point anchor (%, optional — blank = auto)

data_description.target_moisture_low: Optional lower bound for the desired moisture range. Leave blank to derive the range from Target Moisture.
data_description.target_moisture_high: Optional upper bound for the desired moisture range. Leave blank to derive the range from Target Moisture.
data_description.et_source: Auto uses greenhouse sensors for greenhouse zones and weather sensors otherwise. Choose a source to prefer one climate input set.
data_description.soil_type: Seeds the water-balance model before enough learning history exists.
data_description.area_m2: Optional. Couples litres to depth so a new zone starts near the right gain. Steady-state learning overrides it.
data_description.root_depth_mm: Optional. Wetted root-zone depth used to convert mm of water to moisture % and ground FAO-56 ET. ~200 mm if unsure.
data_description.sensor_depth_mm: Optional. Installation depth of the soil-moisture probe. Warns if much shallower than the root depth, which over-triggers watering.
data_description.rain_fraction: Share of natural rainfall that reaches this zone. 100% for open beds, 0% for greenhouses, in between for covered or partly-covered zones.
data_description.min_application: Skip watering when the computed amount is below this, unless a heat emergency applies. Avoids frequent tiny top-ups.
data_description.weather_forecast_entity: Optional weather entity used as the preferred hourly forecast source for temperature, humidity, wind and rain.
data_description.observed_air_temperature: Optional ET/model input. Use a local greenhouse sensor for greenhouse zones, or an outdoor weather-station sensor for outdoor zones.
data_description.observed_air_humidity: Optional ET/model input. Use a local greenhouse sensor for greenhouse zones, or an outdoor weather-station sensor for outdoor zones.
data_description.forecast_air_temperature: Optional ET/model input. Use the zone's relevant weather forecast sensor.
data_description.forecast_air_humidity: Optional ET/model input. Use the zone's relevant weather forecast sensor.
data_description.wind_speed: Optional ET/model input. Outdoor zones usually use the weather station; greenhouse zones can leave this blank unless local airflow is measured.
data_description.solar_radiation: Optional ET/model input. Select irradiance or illuminance from the local greenhouse or outdoor weather station.
data_description.history_days: How much sensor history the model learns from at setup and on 'Re-learn from History'. 2 months is recommended; reaching beyond ~10 days relies on Home Assistant long-term statistics.
data_description.target_mode: Automatic lets the model own the target band from learned soil limits and the demand profile. Manual keeps your Target Moisture fixed.
data_description.demand_profile: Sets how thirsty the plants are. Adjusts trigger thresholds and drought tolerance only; the soil model is unchanged.

edit_zone.title: Edit an Irrigation Zone
edit_zone.description: Select a zone to edit, then adjust its inputs. Watering Actuator fields appear on the next step.

data.safety_blockers: Safety Blockers (block watering when on or unavailable)

greenhouse.title: Greenhouse Settings
greenhouse.description: These inputs apply only to greenhouse zones. Configure rain protection and optional local greenhouse climate sensors.

data.protected_rain: Protected from rain (ignore rain in decisions)

actuator.title: Watering Actuator
actuator.description: Configure how this zone waters using the selected actuator type ({actuator_type}). Only the fields for that type are shown. If the actuator switch belongs to a LinkTap MQTT device, leave the feedback sensors blank and they are auto-detected from that device.

data.linktap_device: LinkTap device (auto-fills id, switch and sensors)
data.linktap_id: LinkTap id (auto-filled from device; optional override)

data_description.watering_sensor: Leave blank to auto-detect the '_is_watering' binary sensor from the actuator switch's device.
data_description.volume_sensor: Leave blank to auto-detect the '_volume' sensor (never '_volume_limit') from the actuator switch's device. Works with both lifetime-cumulative counters and sensors that reset to 0 each watering; the integration's 'Total Watering Volume' sensor provides the running cumulative total (no utility meter helper needed).

error.no_moisture_sensors: Select at least one soil moisture sensor for the zone.
error.target_range_invalid: Target moisture low must be less than or equal to target moisture high.
error.linktap_requires_id_and_switch: Select a LinkTap device, or enter both a LinkTap id and a switch entity.

evaluate_zone.name: Evaluate zone
evaluate_zone.description: Create a Run Request for one or more Irrigation Zones and return the Irrigation Decision without watering.

entity_id.name: Irrigation Decision sensor(s)
entity_id.description: The Irrigation Decision sensor entities to evaluate.

force.name: Force water
force.description: Bypass soft checks (still respects Safety Blockers).

run_zone.name: Run zone
run_zone.description: Create a Run Request that waters the targeted zones through their Watering Actuator when the decision allows.

entity_id.name: Zone entity
entity_id.description: An entity belonging to the zone(s) to run.

force.name: Force water
force.description: Bypass soft checks (still respects Safety Blockers).

stop_zone.name: Stop zone
stop_zone.description: Stop an in-progress Watering Event for the targeted zones (only zones with a configured stop path).

entity_id.name: Zone entity
entity_id.description: An entity belonging to the zone(s) to stop.

start_field_capacity_discovery.name: Start Field Capacity Discovery
start_field_capacity_discovery.description: Begin the guided Field Capacity Discovery workflow for the targeted zones. You will be prompted to saturate the moisture sensor and cover the soil; the integration then monitors drainage and records Field Capacity automatically.

entity_id.name: Zone entity
entity_id.description: An entity belonging to the zone(s) to calibrate.
